title: Rebuild Following The Arcs
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild Following The Arcs?             Quote Post by Razeil100 » Wed Sep 14, 2011 1:40 pm Not sure if they are official terms or not, but 1.0 and 2.0 were pretty clearly enveloped by the tones of the prologue and action arc respectively. 2.0 did go past its arc's ending as far as the timeline goes, but they cut out leliel so we haven't really had any big mindfucks yet. I think its safe to say this trend will continue with the reportedly dark swing 3.0 will be taking. What do you guys think?

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Wed Sep 14, 2011 3:30 pm I know I'm going to hate myself for saying this but yes I am waiting for Asuka's and Shinji's eventual breakdown , and the doll subplot to kick in for Asuka. ............ even after all that I'm still hoping for a slightly happier ending.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Sep 14, 2011 3:48 pm Really, Ha encompasses both Action and Descent arcs (or tries to, anyway). At least one of the CRC interviews made reference to the ending of Ha being a deliberate response to the events of ep23' and given the abrupt shift of mood that takes place halfway through Ha, I can't say it's a straight adaptation or even purely inspired by Action Arc. But Q certainly does seem set to take on an altered version of the Ending Arc, and possibly open a way for a fourth film to add to this retread of the NGE narrative.

Article: Rebuild Following The Arcs
[]: Rebuild Following The Arcs?             Quote Post by Razeil100 » Wed Sep 14, 2011 1:40 pm Not sure if they are official terms or not, but 1.0 and 2.0 were pretty clearly enveloped by the tones of the prologue and action arc respectively. 2.0 did go past its arc's ending as far as the timeline goes, but they cut out leliel so we haven't really had any big mindfucks yet. I think its safe to say this trend will continue with the reportedly dark swing 3.0 will be taking. What do you guys think?

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Wed Sep 14, 2011 3:30 pm I know I'm going to hate myself for saying this but yes I am waiting for Asuka's and Shinji's eventual breakdown , and the doll subplot to kick in for Asuka. ............ even after all that I'm still hoping for a slightly happier ending.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Sep 14, 2011 3:48 pm Really, Ha encompasses both Action and Descent arcs (or tries to, anyway). At least one of the CRC interviews made reference to the ending of Ha being a deliberate response to the events of ep23' and given the abrupt shift of mood that takes place halfway through Ha, I can't say it's a straight adaptation or even purely inspired by Action Arc. But Q certainly does seem set to take on an altered version of the Ending Arc, and possibly open a way for a fourth film to add to this retread of the NGE narrative.
